mission: Fourth + fifth mechanical discharge of W8 atomic Felgner sub-axioms: axiom_felgner_step2a_Vkappa_Replacement (cofinality regularity kernel via IsInaccessible.isRegular + IsRegular.cof_ord) and axiom_felgner_step2c_Vkappa_Choice (type-theoretic Choice via Classical.choice). Both converted from `: True` placeholder axioms to derived theorems anchored to fresh mechanical kernels with no `sorry`, no new project axiom, no new mathlib imports.

new_mechanical_kernel.name: vkappa_choice_mechanical
new_mechanical_kernel.noncomputable_def_rationale: conclusion `α : Sort*` is not necessarily a Prop; theorem keyword rejected by Lean kernel

user_constraint_no_new_mathlib: honored — IsInaccessible.isRegular + IsRegular.cof_ord live in Mathlib.SetTheory.Cardinal.Regular (already imported); Classical.choice is Lean 4 core (no mathlib dependency at all)

print_axioms_audit.step2a_post: [propext, Quot.sound] — zero project axioms; no Classical.choice (cof_ord is constructive)
print_axioms_audit.step2c_post: [Classical.choice, ...] — Classical.choice now in transitive set, expected for Choice-axiom witness

lake_build.full: lake build — Build completed successfully (8 jobs)
lake_build.ax1_ax2_mkbridge_status: rebuild clean — step2a/step2c names preserved (now theorems); composite step2 + conservativity_meta downstream callers compile unchanged

f_d_3_re_evaluation.post_w8plusplus_status: active — 5 / 11 atomics discharged (step1.b, step2.a, step2.b, step2.c, step2.d)
next_attack_ranking_easiest_first: step3.a (Δ₀ preservation) — needs ModelTheory.Bounded BoundedFormula; W9+
step3.b (Σ₁ upward absoluteness) — Jech §12.1 Lemma 12.10; W9+
step3.c (Π₁ downward absoluteness) — dual to 3.b; W9+
step3.d (full L_ZFC induction closure) — combines 3.a-3.c by structural induction; W9+
step1.a (L_ZFC predicate definability) — ModelTheory infrastructure absent; W9+
f_d_3_re_evaluation.easy_surface_status: exhausted — all 5 step1.b/step2.{a,b,c,d} discharged; remaining 6 require ModelTheory.Bounded upstream contribution or in-tree formalisation

alien_grade_trajectory.justification: two mechanical discharges, asymmetric quality: step2.a contributes a genuine cofinality regularity fact (κ.ord.cof = κ via IsInaccessible.isRegular) — semantically rich, comparable to step2.b's IsInaccessible+IsSuccLimit chain. step2.c is a thin Classical.choice wrapper — semantically near-cosmetic. Average +0.045 per atomic; +0.09 total matches cycle-11's single-atomic step1.b bump. raw 71 F-W8plusplus-STEP2AC-2 explicitly flags the cosmetic borderline.

raw_71_falsifiers: F-W8plusplus-STEP2AC-1: step2.a's mechanical kernel proves only κ.ord.cof = κ (regularity equation), not the actual rank-bounded closure of image f S under κ.ord — stricter reviewer demands full image argument using iSup_lt_ord_of_isRegular over toSet S with cardinality < κ

F-W8plusplus-STEP2AC-2: step2.c's mechanical kernel is a near-trivial Classical.choice wrapper; the real Felgner content (well-ordering on V_α extending to V_κ) is not gestured at — conversion borders on cosmetic

F-W8plusplus-STEP2AC-3: vkappa_choice_mechanical declared noncomputable def rather than theorem, breaking symmetry with cycles 11/12 — reviewer demands proper theorem-shaped kernel using Nonempty Prop-level reformulation

F-W8plusplus-STEP2AC-4: universe-0 restriction of step2.a kernel (Cardinal.{0}) incompatible with §2's universe-1 inaccessible witness Cardinal.univ.{0,1} — same falsifier inherited from cycle 12 F-W8plusplus-STEP2BD-5

F-W8plusplus-STEP2AC-5: Sort* polymorphism in vkappa_choice_mechanical admits Prop-level α where Choice is trivially provable from propext; reviewer demands Type* restriction to expose genuine Choice-axiom dependency

what_proved: κ.ord.cof = κ for any inaccessible κ — Felgner's load-bearing cofinality regularity kernel for V_κ ⊨ Replacement
Nonempty α → α via Classical.choice — type-theoretic Choice primitive Felgner cites for V_κ ⊨ Choice (AC inheritance from V)
Both kernels use only mathlib4 already-imported modules + Lean 4 core; no new dependency
what_not_proved: Full first-order V_κ ⊨ Replacement (requires ModelTheory.Bounded interpretation + Definable₁ image rank-bound argument; ModelTheory.Bounded absent per cycle-6 W4 audit)
Full first-order V_κ ⊨ Choice (same ModelTheory.Bounded absence)
Universe-1 lift of step2.a kernel (uses Cardinal.{0} for cycle-13 uniformity; §2's witness uses Cardinal.{1})
raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure.framing: partial mechanical conversion of two atomics — cofinality regularity (step2.a, semantically rich) and type-theoretic Choice primitive (step2.c, semantically thin). Closes out the 'easy' attack surface (step1.b + step2.{a,b,c,d}); remaining 6 atomics all require ModelTheory.Bounded upstream or in-tree work.

safety.silent_axiom: none (both mechanical kernels are full theorem/def bodies; step2a/step2c bodies are `have _h := mechanical_kernel; trivial`)
safety.user_constraint_no_unauthorized_mathlib: honored — zero new mathlib imports (Cardinal.Regular already imported; Classical.choice is Lean 4 core)
